heading: This Afternoon
text: Variable clouds. Scattered showers and thunderstorms, except likely near the international border; a severe storm possible, mainly south of Route 2. Highs from the upper 70s to mid 80s south, 70s to near 80 north. South to southwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly cloudy. Showers and thunderstorms likely; a severe storm again possible, mainly south of Route 2. Lows from the upper 40s to mid 50s north, mid to upper 50s in the south. West to northwest winds 5 to 10 mph and diminishing.

heading: Friday
text: Mostly to partly cloudy, with a chance of showers, mainly in the morning. Highs from the mid 60s to lower 70s, some lower 60s far north. Winds becoming north 5 to 10 mph.
